/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/rosstackexe.dir/src/rosstack_main.cpp.o  -o /home/pi/picreate/Create2/ws/devel_isolated/rospack/bin/rosstack  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/picreate/Create2/ws/devel_isolated/rospack/lib: /home/pi/picreate/Create2/ws/devel_isolated/rospack/lib/librospack.so -lboost_filesystem -lboost_program_options -lboost_system -ltinyxml -lboost_filesystem -lboost_program_options -lboost_system -lpython2.7
